name: MSI Installation From Suspicious Locations
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: MSI Installation From Suspicious Locations
SIGMA Description: Detects MSI package installation from suspicious locations

False positives:
- False positives may occur if you allow installation from folders such as the desktop, the public folder or remote shares. A baseline is required before production use.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND ("Event ID" IN('1040', '1042')) AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\perflogs\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\users\public\%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\winget*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\updhealthtools.msi%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MSI Installation From Suspicious Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND ("Event ID" IN('1040', '1042')) AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\perflogs\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\users\public\%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\winget*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\updhealthtools.msi%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MSI Installation From Suspicious Locations
